title: [Blue Glacier, Mountain Pass]
description: Blowing snow makes the going tough and you hug the walls of the mountainside as you proceed cautiously along the rough trail.  Small rocks slip and slide beneath your feet, aided by the slickness of the wet snow.

wayto.2524: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'northeast'
wayto.2526: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'west'
